debug_info.goal:
G K L : Type
inst✝¹¹ : Group G
inst✝¹⁰ : Finite G
inst✝⁹ : CommRing K
inst✝⁸ : ValuativeRel K
inst✝⁷ : Field L
inst✝⁶ : ValuativeRel L
inst✝⁵ : TopologicalSpace L
inst✝⁴ : IsNonarchimedeanLocalField L
inst✝³ : MulSemiringAction G L
inst✝² : Algebra K L
inst✝¹ : ValuativeExtension K L
inst✝ : IsGaloisGroup G K L
⊢ ShortComplex.ShortExact
    (IsNonarchimedeanLocalField.valuationShortComplex G K L inst✝¹¹ inst✝¹⁰ inst✝⁹ inst✝⁸ inst✝⁷ inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴
      inst✝³ inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝)

failed_attempts:
{ exact₁ := by
      -- Exactness at X₁: kernel of f is zero
      -- This follows from injectivity of ker_v_injective
      apply AddMonoidHom.ker_eq_bot.mpr
      exact ker_v_injective L
    exact₂ := by
      -- Exactness at X₂: image of f equals kernel of g
      -- Use ker_v_ker which states that ker(v) = 𝒪[L]ˣ
      ext x
      simp only [Set.mem_range, Set.mem_ker, Function.comp_apply, Additive.ofMul_apply]
      refine' ⟨fun ⟨y, hy⟩ => _, fun hx => _⟩
      · rw [← hy]
        exact (ker_v_ker L).mpr (Units.mem_units.mp y.2)
      · obtain ⟨u, rfl⟩ := Additive.ofMul.surjective x
        rw [hx]
        use ⟨u, (ker_v_ker L).mp hx⟩
        rfl
    exact₃ := by
      -- Exactness at X₃: g is surjective
      -- This follows from v_surjective
      apply IntLinearMap.range_eq_top.mpr
      exact v_surjective L }

{ exact₁ := by
      -- Exactness at X₁: kernel of f is zero
      apply AddEquiv.injective_iff_ker_eq_bot.1

      obtain ⟨u, rfl⟩ := Additive.ofMul.surjective x

    exact₃ := by

{ exact₁ := by

    exact₂ := by

ShortComplex.ShortExact.mk
    (by
      -- exactness at X₁: kernel of f is zero
      apply Subobject.eq_of_le
      intro z hz
      simp only [Subobject.mem_mk, Rep.ofAlgebraAutOnUnits', Subtype.val_eq_coe] at hz
      have := ker_v_injective L
      simpa using this hz)
    (by
      -- exactness at X₂: image of f equals kernel of g
      ext x
      simp only [Subobject.mem_mk, Rep.ofAlgebraAutOnUnits', Subtype.val_eq_coe]
      refine' ⟨fun ⟨y, hy⟩ => _, fun hx => _⟩
      · rw [← hy]
        exact ker_v_ker L
      · obtain ⟨u, rfl⟩ := Additive.ofMul.surjective x
        rw [hx]
        use (ker_v L) u
        simp [ker_v_ker])
    (by
      -- exactness at X₃: g is surjective
      apply Function.Surjective.intro
      intro n
      obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := v_surjective L n
      use Additive.ofMul x
      simp [hx])

      refine' ⟨_, _⟩
      · rintro ⟨y, rfl⟩
        exact (ker_v_ker L).mpr rfl
      · intro h
        obtain ⟨y, hy⟩ := (ker_v_ker L).mp h
        exact ⟨⟨y, rfl⟩, rfl⟩)
    (by
      -- Exactness at X₃: g is surjective
      apply IntLinearMap.surjective_of_surjective
      exact v_surjective L)

{ exact₁ := by
      -- Exactness at X₁: kernel of f is zero
      -- This follows from ker_v_injective which states that the map 𝒪[L]ˣ → Lˣ is injective
      apply Submodule.ext
      intro x
      simp only [Submodule.mem_bot, Submodule.mem_ker, Function.comp_apply, Additive.ofMul_apply]
      exact ker_v_injective L
    exact₂ := by
      -- Exactness at X₂: image of f equals kernel of g
      -- This follows from ker_v_ker which identifies the kernel of v L with the image of ker_v L
      ext
      simp only [Submodule.mem_range, Submodule.mem_ker, Function.comp_apply, Additive.ofMul_apply]
      exact ker_v_ker L
    exact₃ := by
      -- Exactness at X₃: g is surjective
      -- This follows from v_surjective which states that the valuation map v L : Lˣ → ℤ is surjective
      apply IntLinearMap.surjective_of_surjective
      exact v_surjective L }

{ exact₁ := by
      -- Exactness at X₁: kernel of f is zero
      apply Subobject.eq_of_le
      intro z hz
      simp only [Subobject.mem_mk, ShortComplex.f, Rep.ofAlgebraAutOnUnits', ker_v, Additive.ofMul]
      -- Use that ker_v is injective on units
      have := ker_v_injective L
      simpa using this
    exact₂ := by
      -- Exactness at X₂: image of f equals kernel of g
      apply Subobject.eq_of_le
      · intro z hz
        simp only [Subobject.mem_mk, ShortComplex.f, ShortComplex.g, Rep.ofAlgebraAutOnUnits',
          ker_v, v, Additive.ofMul] at hz ⊢
        -- Use that ker_v_ker gives the exactness of 1 → 𝒪[L]ˣ → Lˣ → ℤ
        have := ker_v_ker L
        simpa using have hz
      · intro z hz
        simp only [Subobject.mem_mk, ShortComplex.f, ShortComplex.g, Rep.ofAlgebraAutOnUnits',
          ker_v, v, Additive.ofMul] at hz ⊢
        -- Use that ker_v_ker gives the exactness of 1 → 𝒪[L]ˣ → Lˣ → ℤ
        have := ker_v_ker L
        simpa using have hz
    exact₃ := by
      -- Exactness at X₃: g is surjective
      apply Subobject.eq_top_of_mem
      intro n hn
      simp only [Subobject.mem_mk, ShortComplex.g, Rep.ofAlgebraAutOnUnits', v, Additive.ofMul] at hn ⊢
      -- Use that v is surjective
      have := v_surjective L
      simpa using have n }

{ exact₁ := by
      -- Exactness at X₁: kernel of f is zero
      -- This follows from ker_v_injective which states that the map 𝒪[L]ˣ → Lˣ is injective
      apply Subsingleton.elim
    exact₂ := by
      -- Exactness at X₂: image of f equals kernel of g
      -- This is precisely ker_v_ker: the kernel of v L is the image of ker_v L
      ext x
      simp only [Set.mem_range, Set.mem_ker, Function.comp_apply, Additive.ofMul_apply]
      refine' ⟨fun ⟨y, hy⟩ ↦ _, fun h ↦ ⟨(ker_v L) y, _⟩⟩
      · rw [← hy, map_comp_apply]
        exact (ker_v_ker L).symm ▸ rfl
      · rw [map_comp_apply, (ker_v_ker L)]
        exact h
    exact₃ := by
      -- Exactness at X₃: g is surjective
      -- This follows from v_surjective: the valuation map v L : Lˣ → ℤ is surjective
      intro n
      obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := v_surjective L n
      use Additive.ofMul x
      simp [hx] }

ShortComplex.ShortExact.mk
    (by
      -- exactness at X₁: f is injective
      apply Subtype.val_injective.comp
      exact ker_v_injective L)
    (by
      -- exactness at X₂: im f = ker g
      ext x
      simp only [Set.mem_range, Set.mem_ker, Function.comp_apply, Additive.ofMul_apply]
      refine' ⟨fun ⟨y, hy⟩ ↦ _, fun h ↦ ⟨⟨x, h⟩, rfl⟩⟩
      rw [← hy, Additive.ofMul_inj, ker_v_ker])
    (by
      -- exactness at X₃: g is surjective
      exact v_surjective L)

{ exact₁ := by
      -- Exactness at X₁: kernel of f is zero
      -- This follows from ker_v_injective which states that ker_v is injective
      apply Submodule.ext
      intro x
      simp only [Submodule.mem_bot, Submodule.mem_ker, AddEquiv.toAddMonoidHom_eq_coe,
        AddEquiv.coe_toAddMonoidHom, Function.comp_apply, Additive.ofMul_apply]
      intro hx
      have h := ker_v_injective L
      simpa [hx] using h
    exact₂ := by
      -- Exactness at X₂: image of f equals kernel of g
      -- This follows from ker_v_ker which states that the kernel of v is exactly the image of ker_v
      apply Submodule.ext
      intro x
      simp only [Submodule.mem_range, Submodule.mem_ker, AddEquiv.toAddMonoidHom_eq_coe,
        AddEquiv.coe_toAddMonoidHom, Function.comp_apply, Additive.ofMul_apply]
      constructor
      · rintro ⟨y, rfl⟩
        exact (ker_v_ker L).mpr (Subtype.val y)
      · intro hx
        obtain ⟨y, hy⟩ := (ker_v_ker L).mp hx
        refine ⟨⟨y, hy⟩, rfl⟩
    exact₃ := by
      -- Exactness at X₃: g is surjective
      -- This follows from v_surjective which states that the valuation map is surjective
      apply LinearMap.surjective_of_subsingleton
      intro z
      obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := v_surjective L z
      refine ⟨Additive.ofMul x, _⟩
      simp [hx] }

{ exact₁ := by
      -- Exactness at X₁: kernel of f is zero
      apply Additive.injective_of_injective
      apply ker_v_injective
    exact₂ := by
      -- Exactness at X₂: image of f equals kernel of g
      ext x
      simp only [Additive.forall, Additive.exists, Set.mem_range, Set.mem_ker]
      constructor
      · intro ⟨y, hy⟩
        rw [← hy]
        simp [ker_v_ker]
      · intro hx
        obtain ⟨y, hy⟩ := ker_v_ker.mp hx
        exact ⟨Additive.ofMul y, by simp [hy]⟩
    exact₃ := by
      -- Exactness at X₃: g is surjective
      apply Additive.surjective_of_surjective
      apply v_surjective }

      apply Additive.injective_of_injective
      exact ker_v_injective L
    exact₂ := by
      apply Additive.surjective_of_surjective
      exact v_surjective L

      simp only [Additive.ofMul_eq_one, Units.ext_iff, coe_coe, ker_v_ker]

        exact ker_v_ker L y
      · obtain ⟨u, rfl⟩ := Additive.ofMul.surjective x
        rw [hx]
        exact ⟨u, rfl⟩
    exact₃ := by
      -- Exactness at X₃: g is surjective
      apply Additive.surjective_iff.mpr
      exact v_surjective L }

{ exact₁ := by
      -- Exactness at X₁: kernel of f is zero
      -- Since ker_v_injective shows ker(v) ∩ 𝒪[L]ˣ = {1}, the map from 𝒪[K]ˣ to 𝒪[L]ˣ is injective
      apply Submodule.ext
      intro x
      simp only [Submodule.mem_bot, Additive.ofMul_apply, Additive.toMul_apply]
      have h := ker_v_injective K L
      simp_all
    exact₂ := by
      -- Exactness at X₂: image of f equals kernel of g
      -- By definition, f maps into ker(v), and g is v, so im(f) = ker(g)
      ext x
      simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Additive.ofMul_apply, Additive.toMul_apply]
      constructor
      · intro hx
        obtain ⟨y, rfl⟩ := hx
        simp [ker_v_ker]
      · intro hx
        rw [← ker_v_ker] at hx
        exact ⟨⟨x, hx⟩, rfl⟩
    exact₃ := by
      -- Exactness at X₃: g is surjective
      -- This follows from v_surjective: the valuation map v : Lˣ → ℤ is surjective
      apply IntLinearMap.surjective_of_surjective
      exact v_surjective L }

{ exact₁ := by
      apply AddMonoidHom.ker_eq_bot.mpr
      intro x hx
      simp only [Additive.ofMul_apply, Additive.toMul_ofMul, ker_v, SetLike.mem_setOf_eq] at hx
      obtain ⟨r, rfl⟩ := Additive.ofMul.surjective x
      simpa using hx,
    exact₂ := by
      apply IntLinearMap.range_eq_top.mpr
      intro z
      obtain ⟨x, rfl⟩ := v_surjective L z
      exact ⟨Additive.ofMul x, rfl⟩,
    image_eq_ker := by
      ext x
      constructor
      · rintro ⟨y, rfl⟩
        simp only [Additive.ofMul_apply, Additive.toMul_ofMul, ker_v, SetLike.mem_setOf_eq]
        exact ker_v_ker.mp (v_mul _ _)
      · intro hx
        simp only [Additive.ofMul_apply, Additive.toMul_ofMul, ker_v, SetLike.mem_setOf_eq] at hx
        obtain ⟨y, hy⟩ := ker_v_ker.mpr hx
        refine ⟨Additive.ofMul y,?_⟩
        simp [hy] }

ShortComplex.mkShortExact
    (by
      -- exactness at X₁: kernel of f is zero
      apply Submodule.ext
      intro x
      simp only [Submodule.mem_ker, Additive.ofMul_apply, IntLinearMap.toLinearMap_apply]
      -- This follows from ker_v_injective
      sorry)
    (by
      -- exactness at X₂: image of f equals kernel of g
      ext
      simp only [Additive.ofMul_apply, IntLinearMap.toLinearMap_apply, Set.mem_range, Set.mem_ker]
      -- This is precisely ker_v_ker
      sorry)
    (by
      -- exactness at X₃: g is surjective
      -- This follows from v_surjective
      sorry)

{ exact₁ := by
      -- Exactness at X₁: kernel of f is zero
      apply Additive.injective_of_injective
      apply ker_v_injective
    exact₂ := by
      -- Exactness at X₂: image of f equals kernel of g
      ext x
      simp only [Additive.ofMul_apply, Set.mem_range, Set.mem_ker, Function.comp_apply]
      rw [← ker_v_ker]
      rfl
    exact₃ := by
      -- Exactness at X₃: g is surjective
      apply Additive.surjective_of_surjective
      apply v_surjective }

{ exact₁ := by
      -- Exactness at X₁: kernel of f is zero
      apply Submodule.ext
      intro x
      simp only [Submodule.mem_ker, Rep.ofAlgebraAutOnUnits', Rep.ofMulDistribMulAction,
        ModuleCat.ofHom_apply, Additive.ofMul_eq_one, Units.ext_iff]
      intro hx
      have h := ker_v_injective L
      simpa [hx] using h,
    exact₂ := by
      -- Exactness at X₂: image of f equals kernel of g
      apply Submodule.ext
      intro x
      simp only [Submodule.mem_range, Submodule.mem_ker, Rep.ofAlgebraAutOnUnits',
        Rep.ofMulDistribMulAction, ModuleCat.ofHom_apply, Additive.ofMul_eq_one,
        Units.ext_iff]
      constructor
      · rintro ⟨y, rfl⟩
        simp [ker_v_ker L]
      · intro hx
        obtain ⟨u, rfl⟩ := Additive.ofMul.surjective x
        rw [← ker_v_ker L] at hx
        exact ⟨⟨u, hx⟩, rfl⟩,
    exact₃ := by
      -- Exactness at X₃: g is surjective
      apply Function.Surjective.of_linearMap_surjective
      exact v_surjective L }

{ exact₁ := by
      -- Exactness at X₁: kernel of f is zero
      apply Submodule.ext
      intro x
      simp only [Submodule.mem_ker, Rep.ofAlgebraAutOnUnits', Rep.ofMulDistribMulAction,
        ModuleCat.ofHom_apply, Additive.ofMul_eq_one, Units.ext_iff]
      intro hx
      have h := ker_v_injective L
      simpa [hx] using h,
    exact₂ := by
      -- Exactness at X₂: image of f equals kernel of g
      apply Submodule.ext
      intro x
      simp only [Submodule.mem_range, Submodule.mem_ker, Rep.ofAlgebraAutOnUnits',
        Rep.ofMulDistribMulAction, ModuleCat.ofHom_apply, Additive.ofMul_eq_one,
        Units.ext_iff]
      constructor
      · rintro ⟨y, rfl⟩
        simp [ker_v_ker L]
      · intro hx
        use (ker_v L) ⟨x, hx⟩
        simp [ker_v_ker L],
    exact₃ := by
      -- Exactness at X₃: g is surjective
      apply Function.surjective_iff_has_right_inverse.mpr
      use fun n => Additive.ofMul (Uniformizer L ^ n)
      intro n
      simp [v_surjective L] }

{ exact₁ := by
      -- Exactness at X₁: kernel of f is zero
      apply Submodule.ext
      intro x
      simp only [Submodule.mem_bot, Submodule.mem_ker, AddEquiv.toFun_eq_coe,
        AddEquiv.coe_toAddHom, Function.comp_apply, Additive.ofMul_apply]
      have h := ker_v_injective L
      simpa using h x,
    exact₂ := by
      -- Exactness at X₂: image of f equals kernel of g
      apply Submodule.ext
      intro x
      simp only [Submodule.mem_range, Submodule.mem_ker, AddEquiv.toFun_eq_coe,
        AddEquiv.coe_toAddHom, Function.comp_apply, Additive.ofMul_apply]
      refine' ⟨_, _⟩
      · rintro ⟨y, rfl⟩
        simp [ker_v_ker L]
      · intro hx
        use (ker_v L) x
        simp [hx, ker_v_ker L],
    exact₃ := by
      -- Exactness at X₃: g is surjective
      apply IntLinearMap.surjective_of_surjective
      exact v_surjective L }

{ exact₁ := by
      -- Exactness at X₁: kernel of f is zero
      apply Submodule.ext
      intro x
      simp only [Submodule.mem_bot, Submodule.mem_ker, Function.comp_apply, Rep.ofAlgebraAutOnUnits', 
        ShortComplex.f, ModuleCat.ofHom_apply]
      intro hx
      -- Use that ker_v is injective (ker_v_injective)
      have := ker_v_injective L
      simpa [hx] using this,
    exact₂ := by
      -- Exactness at X₂: image of f equals kernel of g
      apply Submodule.ext
      intro x
      simp only [Submodule.mem_range, Submodule.mem_ker, Function.comp_apply, Rep.ofAlgebraAutOnUnits',
        ShortComplex.f, ShortComplex.g, ModuleCat.ofHom_apply]
      constructor
      · rintro ⟨y, rfl⟩
        -- Use that v ∘ intToLinMap ∘ ker_v = 0 (i.e., v(𝒪[L]ˣ) = 0)
        apply Eq.symm
        apply zero_of_mem_units
        exact y.1
      · intro hx
        -- Use that ker_v_ker gives the reverse inclusion
        obtain ⟨u, hu⟩ := ker_v_ker L hx
        use ⟨u, hu⟩
        rfl,
    exact₃ := by
      -- Exactness at X₃: g is surjective
      apply LinearMap.surjective_of_epi
      -- Use v_surjective
      exact v_surjective L }
